column1: C[swader: So how does this work? How often do I need to play? I was just getting ready for bed actually, it's 2AM here. Judging by the ""3 days"" labels up there, I'm assuming these are long-term games?
C[JustOrange: yup, you can set them to be correspondence
JustOrange: so you've got lots of time
C[swader: Ahh, excellent. So if I doze off now, it's ok? We can continue tomorrow?
JustOrange: yup, we've got lots of time
